import {vl} from "@vega/vega-lite-api-v5";

Dynamic Plot

Here is a dynamic bar chart, were you can plot any two solutions against each other.

Static Plots

Here we show some interesting relations between 2 'solutions'. We see that in Europe the 'took prescribed medication' is higher than de religious however in Africa it is the opposite. This is easily seen from the plots as the countries in Europe all lie above the diagonal, and the countries in Africa all lie below. The same kind of relation exists between 'talked to a mental health professional' and 'engaged in religious activities'. For that reason we also plotted the relation between 'took prescribed medication' and 'talked to a mental health professional'. It can be seen from the plot that there is a definite connection between the two. The relation is not exaclty lineair, but it is relatively close.
